body.body: NE gets a pass at retrieved memories when milieu arousal is high. Mechanism exists: milieu arousal + NE cycle. See GitHub #309.
body.title: Memory reconsolidation hook (#309) — retrieved memories go plastic under high arousal
body.result: Memory reconsolidation hook implemented (#309). cortex.search() now calls _flag_for_reconsolidation() on returned memories when milieu arousal >= 0.4 and importance_proxy >= 0.6. NE._reconsolidation_pass() runs each NE cycle, fetches flagged memories, calls inference gateway to compare stored content vs current TWM context, and updates narrative+importance if 'update' action returned. Gated by IGOR_RECONSOLIDATION_ENABLED (default true) and IGOR_RECONSOLIDATION_MAX (default 2 per cycle). Postgres and SQLite both supported.
